_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7274230319123795003","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世求生】+【重生】+【系统】+【异能】+【轻松搞笑】+【杀伐果断】 
拥有五大“F”级异能的王明洋，死后重生回到末世前一天。 
重生之后的他，竟然获取了金手指——诸天读书系统。 
通过阅读书籍，便可以提取出各种异能。
不但如此，还可以花费阅读值，将这些异能进行融合。
金属掌控，空间主宰，时间主宰，万象星火，元磁主宰……
无数强大异能接踵而至。
这一次，他不再是曾经的三星五废。 
……
当实力达到一定层次，王明洋豁然发现，这个末世的背后，竟然还隐藏着诸多秘密。
蓝星六大纪元，华夏先祖，太古天使军团，光暗之主，众神之主……
湮灭在历史中的一尊尊强大存在，逐渐展现在他的眼前。
……
当皓月崩碎，太古天使军团降临。
“愿我华夏，人人如龙！”
惊天龙吟响彻云霄，王明洋化身为龙之始祖翱翔于空。
悍然杀向星空！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b72639ce6984621189100bf690a94de9","author":"风起铃儿响","author_id":"","book_id":"7274230319123795003","book_name":"书中自有异能库，我在末世斩神","book_short_name":"诸天图书馆","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7274297655935631931","read_count":"26872","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2355043"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"1076","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,末世,诸天万界,求生,开局,末日求生,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/37ec9da85235ae162ffa27ba7202a0c7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431291&x-signature=FmK2PB4YUIqVt%2FpyQLZGpVATynQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"boo
